scripts.dev:stop: sh -c 'pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:3000 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; fi'
scripts.dev:clean: sh -c 'pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:3000 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pids" ] && [ "${FORCE_CLEAN:-0}" != "1" ]; then echo "Refusing to clean while dev server is running on :3000. Run npm run dev:stop first, or FORCE_CLEAN=1 npm run dev:clean"; exit 1; fi; rm -rf .next .next-dev'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; bash ./scripts/with-local-env.sh next build'
scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; bash ./scripts/with-local-env.sh next start'
scripts.lint: sh -c 'if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin/node ]; then PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH"; fi; bash ./scripts/with-local-env.sh next lint'
